name: Coffee Plantation Walk
description: Guided walk through a working coffee plantation learning about the bean-to-cup process.

name: Abbey Falls Trek
description: Scenic trek through spice plantations to the magnificent Abbey Falls.

name: Raja's Seat Sunset
description: Watch the sunset from the famous Raja's Seat garden and viewpoint.

name: Dubare Elephant Camp
description: Bathe and feed elephants at the Dubare Elephant Camp on the Cauvery River.

name: Coorgi Cuisine Cooking Class
description: Learn to cook authentic Coorgi pork curry and akki roti with a local family.

name: Mandalpatti Jeep Ride
description: Off-road jeep ride to the Mandalpatti viewpoint above the clouds.

name: Edakkal Caves Trek
description: Trek to ancient caves with prehistoric petroglyphs dating back 6,000 years.

name: Bamboo Rafting
description: Bamboo rafting through serene backwaters with a local guide.

name: Spice Garden Tour
description: Walk through an organic spice garden and learn about Kerala's spice heritage.

name: Chembra Peak Trek
description: Trek to the highest peak in Wayanad with a heart-shaped lake at the summit.

name: Tea Factory Visit
description: Tour a working tea factory and learn about tea processing from plucking to packaging.

name: Eravikulam Trek
description: Trek through Eravikulam National Park and spot the endangered Nilgiri Tahr.

name: Shola Forest Walk
description: Guided nature walk through the ancient Shola forests with a tribal guide.

name: Mattupetty Boating
description: Speedboat and pedal boat rides on the scenic Mattupetty Dam reservoir.

name: Nilgiri Mountain Railway
description: Ride the UNESCO World Heritage Nilgiri Mountain Railway through tunnels and bridges.

name: Botanical Gardens Walk
description: Explore the 22-hectare Government Botanical Gardens with over 1,000 plant species.

name: Toda Village Visit
description: Visit an indigenous Toda tribal village and learn about their unique culture.

name: Old Goa Heritage Walk
description: Guided walk through Portuguese-era churches and convents of Old Goa.

name: Kayaking in Backwaters
description: Kayak through mangrove-lined backwaters with a certified local instructor.

name: Sunset Cruise
description: Evening cruise on the Mandovi River with live Goan music and snacks.

name: Spice Plantation Tour
description: Tour a tropical spice plantation with a traditional Goan lunch included.

name: Amber Fort Tour
description: Explore the magnificent Amber Fort with a certified local history guide.

name: Block Printing Workshop
description: Learn traditional Rajasthani block printing from master artisans.

name: Street Food Tour
description: Taste pyaaz kachori, lassi, and chaat at Jaipur's best local food stalls.

name: Hot Air Balloon Ride
description: Sunrise hot air balloon flight over Jaipur's forts and Aravalli hills.

name: Lake Pichola Boat Ride
description: Boat ride on Lake Pichola with views of City Palace and Jag Mandir.

name: Miniature Painting Class
description: Learn the art of Mewar miniature painting with a local master painter.

name: Solang Valley Paragliding
description: Tandem paragliding over Solang Valley with certified local pilots.

name: Old Manali Cafe Hopping
description: Explore quirky cafes in Old Manali with river views and local bakes.

name: Jogini Waterfall Trek
description: Trek through deodar forests to the stunning Jogini Waterfall.

name: White Water Rafting
description: Grade III-IV white water rafting on the Ganges with trained local guides.

name: Sunrise Yoga Session
description: Early morning yoga and meditation on the Ganges riverbank.

name: Bungee Jumping
description: 83-metre bungee jump at Mohan Chatti — India's highest bungee.

name: French Quarter Cycle Tour
description: Cycle through the charming French Quarter with a local storyteller guide.

name: Auroville Visit
description: Visit the Matrimandir and learn about this universal township.

name: Scuba Diving
description: Introductory scuba dive in the clear waters off Pondicherry coast.
